message:
fix(tests): relax root-region invariant to 'at most one' and add wheel test doc comment

tests/property_region_ops.rs:
- Change single_root invariant check from 'exactly one root' (roots.len() != 1)
  to 'at most one root' (roots.len() > 1), because an empty region table with
  zero roots is a valid transient state during teardown — the previous assertion
  caused spurious proptest failures on sequences that destroy all regions

tests/wheel_hit_tick_test.rs:
- Add module-level doc comment describing the test's purpose (timer wheel tick
  skipping bounds verification)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
